prompt: Customize the CardTopRight Remotion component by setting the name, title, left highlight line color, title text color, background color, animation stiffness, and text delay while preserving the horizontal slide-in animation from the right at the top right of the viewport.

propsSchema.name: lineColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the left highlight line.

propsSchema.name: titleColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the title text.

propsSchema.name: backgroundColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the card background block.

propsSchema.name: stiffness
propsSchema.description: Spring stiffness for the slide-in animation.

propsSchema.name: textDelay
propsSchema.description: Frame delay before the text fades in.
